name: cpu_rec
description: Tool to identify the CPU architecture of an arbitrary binary blob (e.g. firmware). Tool: https://github.com/airbus-seclab/cpu_rec. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1229 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map cpu_rec output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved cpu_rec output file to parse instead of running it live.
